CHAIN-FORWARDED.summary: Phase B chain notification (over TCP). Sent by an upstream peer (leader → F1, or Fk → F(k+1)) after it has completed an RDMA-WRITE into this follower's landing pool, telling this follower the bytes have arrived. If not the chain tail, this follower's chain worker thread RDMA-WRITEs the same bytes onward to its successor.
CHAIN-FORWARDED.complexity: O(1) plus the RDMA chain hop if not tail.
